title: dendrocnide basirotunda
intro: Dendrocnide basirotunda, also known as the stinging tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae and is native to Australia. The plant contains urticating hairs that can cause severe pain and inflammation when they come into contact with skin, making it one of the most venomous plants in the world. Despite its painful properties, the plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and tinctures, which are believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain.
